allow: Bash(for dash in audit-pipeline activity-apiserver pipeline-red)

Bash(for dash in activity:vector_throughput:5m activity:vector_writes:5m activity:pipeline_lag:5m activity:nats_consumer_lag activity:nats_message_rate:5m activity:data_freshness_seconds activity:clickhouse_pool_utilization)
Bash(for pod in chi-activity-clickhouse-activity-0-0-0 chi-activity-clickhouse-activity-0-1-0 chi-activity-clickhouse-activity-0-2-0)
Bash(summary: 'Helm chart {{ audit.objectRef.name }} updated in namespace {{ audit.objectRef.namespace }}')

Bash(# Wait for processing and check for recent activities sleep 3 curl -k -s ""https://localhost:8443/apis/activity.miloapis.com/v1alpha1/activities?limit=5"" 2>&1 | jq -r ''.items[]? | ""\\\(.metadata.creationTimestamp\) - \\\(.spec.summary\)""'')

Bash(# Restart port forward pkill -f ""port-forward.*9443"" || true sleep 2 task test-infra:kubectl -- port-forward -n activity-system svc/activity-apiserver 9443:443 & sleep 3 # Make a test request echo ""Making test request..."" curl -sk ""https://localhost:9443/apis/activity.miloapis.com/v1alpha1/activities?start=now-7d&filter=spec.changeSource%20%3D%3D%20%22human%22&limit=1"" sleep 2 # Check for our debug logs echo """" echo ""=== Checking for handler debug logs ==="" task test-infra:kubectl -- logs -l app=activity-apiserver -n activity-system --tail=20 2>&1)

Bash(# Restart port forward pkill -f ""port-forward.*9443"" || true sleep 1 task test-infra:kubectl -- port-forward -n activity-system svc/activity-apiserver 9443:443 & sleep 4 # Make a test request echo ""Making test request..."" curl -sk ""https://localhost:9443/apis/activity.miloapis.com/v1alpha1/activities?start=now-7d&filter=spec.changeSource%20%3D%3D%20%22human%22&limit=1"" 2>&1 sleep 1 # Check for our debug logs echo """" echo ""=== Checking for handler debug logs ==="" task test-infra:kubectl -- logs -l app=activity-apiserver -n activity-system --tail=30 2>&1)

Bash(# Check recent activities to verify they''re being created curl -k -s ""https://localhost:8443/apis/activity.miloapis.com/v1alpha1/activities?limit=5"" 2>&1 | jq -r ''.items[] | ""\\\(.metadata.creationTimestamp\) - \\\(.spec.summary // .spec.resource.kind\)""'')

Bash(# Make a request with resource.kind filter and check logs curl -sk ""https://localhost:9443/apis/activity.miloapis.com/v1alpha1/activities?start=now-7d&filter=spec.resource.kind%20%3D%3D%20%22HelmChart%22&limit=1"" 2>&1 sleep 1 # Check the query that was built task test-infra:kubectl -- logs -l app=activity-apiserver -n activity-system --tail=5 2>&1)

Bash(# Make a request with resource.kind filter and check logs echo ""Making request with resource.kind filter..."" curl -sk ""https://localhost:9443/apis/activity.miloapis.com/v1alpha1/activities?start=now-7d&filter=spec.resource.kind%20%3D%3D%20%22HelmChart%22&limit=1"" 2>&1 sleep 2 # Check the query that was built echo """" echo ""=== Recent query logs ==="" task test-infra:kubectl -- logs -l app=activity-apiserver -n activity-system --tail=20 2>&1)
Bash(# Check if watchActivities is in the deployed bundle curl -k -s ""https://localhost:8443/assets/index.esm-COmcZMmE.js"")

Bash(git -C /Users/scotwells/repos/datum-cloud/activity commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add activity policies for milo, dns-operator, and network-services-operator

Add user-friendly ActivityPolicy examples for external services:

- milo: IAM \(users, groups, roles, policy bindings, machine accounts\),
  resource manager \(organizations, projects\), notifications, and quota
- dns-operator: DNS zones, record sets, zone classes, and discovery
- network-services-operator: networks, subnets, domains, HTTP proxies,
  traffic protection, locations, and connectors

Policies use friendly language \(e.g., "granted access" instead of
"created PolicyBinding"\) and handle system actors appropriately.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
